title: Minecraft Lite Edition / Wool Edition
description: ALL blocks have been transformed into wool in one way or another. The world looks very cute, and most importantly, soft.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7a7c103467b878568e3055272b095f8353ed84e.png)

I present to you the **Minecraft Lite Edition** texture pack!



After seeing a meme on TikTok, I decided to turn it into reality. ALL blocks have been transformed into wool in one way or another. The world looks very cute, and most importantly, soft. It’s made for version 1.21, but I’m sure it will work on older versions as well.



If you have any suggestions for improving this texture pack, feel free to share them in the comments!
